romaji: Daga kotowaru
english: But I refuse. (alt wording 4) (alt wording 56)

japanese: シシシシシ
romaji: Shishishishi
english: Shishishi! (alt wording 30)

japanese: シシシシシ
romaji: Shishishishi
english: Shishishi! (alt wording 30)

japanese: 何ッ！？
romaji: Nani!?
english: What?! (alt wording 19) (alt wording 71)

japanese: 仲間を信じることが俺の魔法だ
romaji: Nakama o shinjiru koto ga ore no mahou da
english: Believing in my friends is my magic.

japanese: 俺は海賊王になる！
romaji: Ore wa kaizoku ou ni naru!
english: I'm gonna be King of the Pirates! (alt wording 20)

japanese: 月に代わっておしおきよ!
romaji: Tsuki ni kawatte oshioki yo!
english: In the name of the moon, I'll punish you! (alt wording 41)

japanese: まだだ、まだ終わらんよ！
romaji: Mada da, mada owaran yo!
english: Not yet! It's not over yet! (alt wording 22) (alt wording 74)

japanese: なにィ！？
romaji: Nanii!?
english: What?! (alt wording 9) (alt wording 61)

japanese: 次にお前は「やれやれだぜ」と言う！
romaji: Tsugi ni omae wa 'yare yare da ze' to iu!
english: Next you'll say, 'Good grief!'

japanese: このジョルノ・ジョバァーナには夢がある！
romaji: Kono Joruno Jobana ni wa yume ga aru!
english: I, Giorno Giovanna, have a dream! (alt wording 5) (alt wording 57)

japanese: だが断る
romaji: Daga kotowaru
english: But I refuse. (alt wording 4) (alt wording 56)
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: 光を待つだけでは夜は終わらない。自分で一歩踏み出した時、朝は始まる。
romaji: Hikari o matsu dake de wa yoru wa owaranai. Jibun de ippo fumidashita toki, asa wa hajimaru.
english: The night doesn't end by waiting for the light. Dawn begins when you take the first step yourself.

japanese: あきらめたらそこで試合終了ですよ…？
romaji: Akirametara soko de shiai shuuryou desu yo...?
english: If you give up, that's the end of the game. (alt wording 21)

japanese: 何ッ！？
romaji: Nani!?
english: What?! (alt wording 19)

japanese: このジョルノ・ジョバァーナには夢がある！
romaji: Kono Joruno Jobana ni wa yume ga aru!
english: I, Giorno Giovanna, have a dream! (alt wording 5)

japanese: このジョルノ・ジョバァーナには夢がある！
romaji: Kono Joruno Jobana ni wa yume ga aru!
english: I, Giorno Giovanna, have a dream! (alt wording 5) (alt wording 57)

japanese: ロードローラーだッ！
romaji: Rodo rora da!
english: Road roller! (alt wording 1)

japanese: だが…それがいい。
romaji: Daga... sore ga ii.
english: But... that's what I like.
anime: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable

japanese: 一人では弱くても、仲間となら強くなれる
romaji: Hitori de wa yowakute mo, nakama to nara tsuyoku nareru
english: Even if you're weak alone, you can become strong with your friends.

japanese: イエス！イエス！イエス！イエス！
romaji: Iesu! Iesu! Iesu! Iesu!
english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! (alt wording 2)

japanese: 守るものがある限り、俺は負けない
romaji: Mamoru mono ga aru kagiri, ore wa makenai
english: As long as I have something to protect, I won't lose.

japanese: 月に代わっておしおきよ!
romaji: Tsuki ni kawatte oshioki yo!
english: In the name of the moon, I'll punish you!

japanese: 月に代わっておしおきよ!

english: In the name of the moon, I'll punish you! (alt wording 41)

english: Gurararara! (alt wording 31) (alt wording 83)

japanese: 俺は人間をやめるぞ！ジョジョーーッ！！

english: I'm going to stop being human, JoJo! (alt wording 12) (alt wording 64)

romaji: Waraeba ii to omou yo
english: I think you should just laugh. (alt wording 24) (alt wording 76)

japanese: 無駄無駄無駄無駄無駄！
romaji: Muda muda muda muda muda!
english: Useless! Useless! Useless! (alt wording 7)

japanese: 諦めるという言葉は俺の辞書にない
romaji: Akirameru to iu kotoba wa ore no jisho ni nai
english: The word 'give up' isn't in my dictionary.

japanese: 痛みを伴わない教訓には意味がない
romaji: Itami o tomonawanai kyoukun ni wa imi ga nai
english: A lesson without pain is meaningless. (alt wording 35)

japanese: 世界は残酷だ…それでも美しい
romaji: Sekai wa zankoku da... soredemo utsukushii
english: This world is cruel... yet so beautiful. (alt wording 26) (alt wording 78)

japanese: 私、面白いでしょ！？
romaji: Watashi, omoshiroi desho!?
english: I'm Charming, Aren't I?!

japanese: 君たちにとって『人間』ってなんだ？
romaji: Kimitachi ni totte 'ningen' tte nan da?
english: What is human to you people?

japanese: 撃っていいのは撃たれる覚悟がある奴だけだ
romaji: Utte ii no wa uterareru kakugo ga aru yatsu dake da
english: Only those prepared to be shot should pull the trigger.
anime: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion

japanese: 守るものがある限り、俺は負けない
romaji: Mamoru mono ga aru kagiri, ore wa makenai
english: As long as I have something to protect, I won't lose. (alt wording 43)

japanese: 守るものがある限り、俺は負けない
romaji: Mamoru mono ga aru kagiri, ore wa makenai
english: As long as I have something to protect, I won't lose.

japanese: 真実を語ることが残酷であるならば、嘘をつくことは間違いなく優しさの行為に違いない。つまり、優しさとは嘘なのだ。
romaji: Shinjitsu o kataru koto ga zankokudearunaraba, usowotsuku koto wa machigainaku yasashi-sa no kōi ni chigainai. Tsumari, yasashi Sato wa usona noda.
english: If to be truthful is to be cruel, then lying must surely be an act of kindness. And so, kindness is a lie.

japanese: 僕は新世界の神となる
romaji: Boku wa shin sekai no kami to naru
english: I will become the god of the new world. (alt wording 44)

japanese: 撃っていいのは撃たれる覚悟がある奴だけだ
